[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010001001 4
1 1101001101 6
2 0110010000 3
3 0101110110 6
4 1101111101 8
5 0111111000 6
6 1101110110 7
7 1110111101 8

72 27 1111111111 a
